campaignTrail_temp.jet_data = [{
    "mapping_enabled": true,
    "mapping_data": {
        "electionPk": "20",
        "mapSvg": "",
        "x": "1800",
        "y": "1800",
        "dx": "-650",
        "dy": "160"
    },
    "nicknames": {
        "131": "201",
        "132": "203",
        "133": "205"
    }
}
]

async function handleMutations(mutationsList, observer) {
    if (observerRunning) return;
    observerRunning = true;
    observer.disconnect();
    await handleFooter();
    observer.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    observerRunning = false;
}
let processedNodes = new Set();
let observerRunning = false;

var element = document.getElementById('controlElement');
if (!element) {
	let singleObserver = new MutationObserver(handleMutations);
	singleObserver.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
	var controlElement = document.createElement('div');
	controlElement.style.display = 'none';
	controlElement.id = 'controlElement';
	document.body.appendChild(controlElement);
}

async function handleFooter() {
    var gameWindow = document.getElementById('game_window');
    addHeadquarterButton()
    var existingFooter = document.getElementById('new_footer');
    if (existingFooter) {
        return;
    }

    var oldCandidatePic = document.getElementById('candidate_pic');

    if(oldCandidatePic){
        var candidatePicSrc = oldCandidatePic.src;
        oldCandidatePic.remove();
    }
    else{
        return
    }

    var oldRunningMatePic = document.getElementById('running_mate_pic');

    if(oldRunningMatePic) {
        var runningMatePicSrc = oldRunningMatePic.src;
        oldRunningMatePic.remove();
    }
    else{
        return
    }

    var new_footer = document.createElement("div");
    new_footer.id = "new_footer";
    new_footer.style.display = "flex";
    new_footer.style.justifyContent = "center";
    new_footer.style.alignItems = "center";

    var candidatePic = createNewImageElement("https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/b74eb2d11364.png", 'borderBottom',"WOW");
    var runningMatePic = createNewImageElement("https://i.imgur.com/T57rMr5.png", 'borderBottom',"WOW");

    var candidateBox = createBox(candidatePic, "Presidente", "Emídio Guerreiro");
    var runningMateBox = createBox(runningMatePic, "Primeiro-Ministro", "Francisco Cunha Leal");

    var questionInfo = "Question " + (campaignTrail_temp.question_number + 1) + " of " + campaignTrail_temp.global_parameter_json[0].fields.question_count;
    var questionBox = createBoxWithTextAndPic(questionInfo, "https://i.imgur.com/KFchink.png");

    new_footer.appendChild(candidateBox);
    new_footer.appendChild(questionBox);
    new_footer.appendChild(runningMateBox);

    gameWindow.appendChild(new_footer);

    var signDisplay = document.getElementsByClassName('inner_window_sign_display')[0];
    signDisplay.style.display = "none";
};

function createNewImageElement(src, border, tooltip = "") {
    var newImage = document.createElement('img');
    newImage.src = src;
    newImage.style.height = '14em';
    if (border === 'borderBottom') {
        newImage.style.borderBottom = '2px solid black';
    } else if (border === 'borderTop') {
        newImage.style.borderTop = '2px solid black';
    }
    if (tooltip != "")
    {
        // Use a single reusable tooltip: show/move/hide
        const onMouseEnter = (ev) => {
        const html = tooltip;
        __deskTooltip.show(html, ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
        };
        const onMouseMove = (ev) => {
        __deskTooltip.move(ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
        };
        const onMouseLeave = () => {
        __deskTooltip.hide();
        };

        newImage.addEventListener('mouseenter', onMouseEnter);
        newImage.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
        newImage.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeave);
    }
    return newImage;
}

function createBox(imageElement, role, text) {
    var container = document.createElement('div');
    container.classList.add('rounded-box');

    container.style.borderColor = '#1F1D19';
    if(e.altcolors){
        container.style.backgroundColor  = '#d7dcde';
    }
    else{
        container.style.backgroundColor  = '#DBD0D0';
    }
    //container.style.backgroundImage = "url('https://i.imgur.com/timosT8.png')";
    // container.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';  
    // //container.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';  
    // container.style.backgroundRepeat = 'no-repeat';

    var textBox = document.createElement('div');
    var textBox2 = document.createElement('div');
    textBox.style.fontSize = '12px';
    textBox.style.padding = '2px';
    textBox.style.textAlign = 'center';
    textBox.style.marginTop = '-6px';
    textBox.style.marginBottom = '-12px';
    textBox.innerHTML = '<h3 style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif; color: #000000;">' + role + '</h3>';
    textBox2.style.fontSize = '16px';
    textBox2.style.padding = '2px';
    textBox2.style.textAlign = 'center';
    textBox2.style.marginTop  = '-16px';
    textBox2.style.marginBottom = '-12px';
    textBox2.innerHTML = '<h3 style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif; color: #000000;">' + text + '</h3>';

    container.appendChild(imageElement);
    container.appendChild(textBox);
    container.appendChild(textBox2);

    return container;
}

function createBoxWithTextAndPic(text, pictureSrc) {
    var container = document.createElement('div');
    container.classList.add('rounded-box');

    container.style.borderColor = '#1F1D19';
    if(e.altcolors){
        container.style.backgroundColor  = '#d7dcde';
    }
    else{
        container.style.backgroundColor  = '#DBD0D0';
    }
    //container.style.backgroundImage = "url('https://i.imgur.com/timosT8.png')";
    // container.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';  
    // container.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';  
    // container.style.backgroundRepeat = 'no-repeat';

    var textBox = document.createElement('div');
    textBox.style.fontSize = '16px';
    textBox.style.padding = '3px';
    textBox.style.textAlign = 'center';
    textBox.innerHTML = '<h3 style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif; color: #000000;">' + text + '</h3>';

    var pictureElement = createNewImageElement(pictureSrc, 'borderTop');

    container.appendChild(textBox);
    container.appendChild(pictureElement);

    return container;
}

function addHeadquarterButton() {
    // Check if the button already exists
    if (document.getElementById('headquarter_button')) {
        return;
    }

    // Find the reference button by its ID
    const refButton = document.getElementById('view_electoral_map');
    if (!refButton) {
        return;
    }

    // Create a new button element
    const newButton = document.createElement('button');

    newButton.id = 'headquarter_button';

    newButton.style.marginLeft = '1.5em';

    newButton.innerHTML = 'Desk';

    // Attach the click event listener
    newButton.addEventListener('click', openDesk);

    // Insert the new button next to the reference button
    refButton.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', newButton);
}

let savedX = null;
let savedY = null;

let foreignSupportVar = 0;
let guineaStateVar = 0;
let personalismVar = 0;
let cabinetRelationVar = 0;
let delgadoLegacyVar = 0;

function obtainTextForeignSupportVar()
{
    var text = "";
    if (foreignSupportVar < 1)
    {
        text = `The Administration has had <i><span style="color: #821F14;">no</i></span> <b>national successes</b>. (<span style="color:#821F14;">${foreignSupportVar}</span>)`
    }
    return text;
}
function obtainTextGuineaStateVar()
{
    var text = "";
    if (guineaStateVar < 1)
    {
        text = `The Administration has had <i><span style="color: #821F14;">no</i></span> <b>national successes2</b>. (<span style="color:#821F14;">${guineaStateVar}</span>)`
    }
    return text;
}
function obtainTextPersonalismVar()
{
    var text = "";
    if (personalismVar < 1)
    {
        text = `The Administration has had <i><span style="color: #821F14;">no</i></span> <b>national successes3</b>. (<span style="color:#821F14;">${personalismVar}</span>)`
    }
    return text;
}
function obtainTextCabinetRelationVar()
{
    var text = "";
    if (cabinetRelationVar < 1)
    {
        text = `The Administration has had <i><span style="color: #821F14;">no</i></span> <b>national successes4</b>. (<span style="color:#821F14;">${cabinetRelationVar}</span>)`
    }
    return text;
}
function obtainTextDelgadoLegacyVar()
{
    var text = "";
    if (delgadoLegacyVar < 1)
    {
        text = `The Administration has had <i><span style="color: #821F14;">no</i></span> <b>national successes5</b>. (<span style="color:#821F14;">${delgadoLegacyVar}</span>)`
    }
    return text;
}

function loadAgendaContent(container) {
    container.innerHTML = '';

  // --- Allies Section ---
  const allies = document.createElement('h2');
  allies.innerText = 'Allies';
    allies.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
     allies.style.color = '#B62C1A';
     allies.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
     allies.style.fontSize = '24px';
     allies.style.textAlign = 'right';
     allies.style.marginTop = '8px';
  container.appendChild(allies);

  const alliesList = document.createElement('ul');
  alliesList.style.listStyle = 'none';
    alliesList.style.padding = '1px';
     alliesList.style.maxHeight = '104px';
     alliesList.style.overflowY = 'auto';
     alliesList.style.outline = '1px solid #CCCCCC';
    alliesList.style.border = '1px solid transparent';
  characterList.forEach(item => {
    if (item.onList && item.status === "ally") {
      const allyItem = document.createElement('div');
      allyItem.style.display = 'flex';
      allyItem.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
      allyItem.style.marginBottom = '5px';
      allyItem.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128,142,142,0.5)';
      allyItem.style.padding = '1px';
      allyItem.style.borderRadius = '3px';
      allyItem.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';

      const photo = document.createElement('img');
      photo.src = item.picture;
      photo.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
        photo.style.padding = "1px";
      photo.style.width = '100px';
      photo.style.height = '100px';
      photo.style.marginRight = '10px';

      const text = document.createElement('p');
      text.style.fontSize = '13px';
      text.innerHTML = item.text;
      text.style.margin = '0';
      allyItem.append(photo, text);
      alliesList.appendChild(allyItem);
    }
  });
  container.appendChild(alliesList);

  // --- Enemies Section ---
  const enemies = document.createElement('h2');
  enemies.innerText = 'Enemies';
  enemies.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
        enemies.style.color = '#B62C1A';
        enemies.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
        enemies.style.fontSize = '24px';
        enemies.style.textAlign = 'left';
        enemies.style.marginTop = '8px';
  container.appendChild(enemies);

  const enemiesList = document.createElement('ul');
  enemiesList.style.listStyle = 'none';
        enemiesList.style.padding = '1px';
        enemiesList.style.maxHeight = '104px';
        enemiesList.style.overflowY = 'auto';
        enemiesList.style.outline = '1px solid #CCCCCC';
        enemiesList.style.border = '1px solid transparent';
  characterList.forEach(item => {
    if (item.onList && item.status === "enemy") {
      const enemyItem = document.createElement('div');
                enemyItem.style.display = 'flex';
                enemyItem.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
                enemyItem.style.marginBottom = '5px';
                enemyItem.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128, 142, 142, 0.5)';
                enemyItem.style.padding = '1px';
                enemyItem.style.borderRadius = '3px';
                enemyItem.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';

                const photo = document.createElement('img');
                photo.src = item.picture;
                photo.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
                photo.style.padding = "1px";
                photo.style.width = '100px';
                photo.style.height = '100px';
                photo.style.marginRight = '10px';

                const text = document.createElement('p');
                text.style.fontSize = "13px";
                text.innerHTML = item.text;
                text.style.margin = '0';
      enemyItem.append(photo, text);
      enemiesList.appendChild(enemyItem);
    }
  });
  container.appendChild(enemiesList);
  // --- Presidential Contenders Section ---
    const contendersTitle = document.createElement('h2');
    contendersTitle.innerText = 'Presidential Contenders';
    contendersTitle.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
    contendersTitle.style.color = '#B62C1A';
    contendersTitle.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
    contendersTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
    contendersTitle.style.textAlign = 'right';
    contendersTitle.style.marginTop = '10px';

    container.appendChild(contendersTitle);

    const contendersBox = document.createElement('div');
    contendersBox.style.listStyle = 'none';
        contendersBox.style.padding = '1px';
        contendersBox.style.maxHeight = '104px';
        contendersBox.style.overflowY = 'auto';
        contendersBox.style.outline = '1px solid #CCCCCC';
        contendersBox.style.border = '1px solid transparent';
  contenderList.forEach(item => {
    if (item.onList && item.status === "enemy") {
      const contenderItem = document.createElement('div');
                contenderItem.style.display = 'flex';
                contenderItem.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
                contenderItem.style.marginBottom = '5px';
                contenderItem.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128, 142, 142, 0.5)';
                contenderItem.style.padding = '1px';
                contenderItem.style.borderRadius = '3px';
                contenderItem.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';

                const photo = document.createElement('img');
                photo.src = item.picture;
                photo.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
                photo.style.padding = "1px";
                photo.style.width = '100px';
                photo.style.height = '100px';
                photo.style.marginRight = '10px';

                const text = document.createElement('p');
                text.style.fontSize = "13px";
                text.innerHTML = item.text;
                text.style.margin = '0';
      contenderItem.append(photo, text);
      contendersBox.appendChild(contenderItem);
    }
  });

    container.appendChild(contendersBox);
}

// === FOREIGN CONTENT===
function loadForeignContent(container) {
  container.innerHTML = '';
  const title = document.createElement('h2');
  title.innerText = 'Foreign Leaders';
    title.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
     title.style.color = '#B62C1A';
     title.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
     title.style.fontSize = '24px';
     title.style.marginTop = '8px';
  container.appendChild(title);

    const foreignLeadersList = document.createElement('ul');
  foreignLeadersList.style.listStyle = 'none';
    foreignLeadersList.style.padding = '1px';
     foreignLeadersList.style.maxHeight = '430px';
     foreignLeadersList.style.overflowY = 'auto';
     foreignLeadersList.style.outline = '1px solid #CCCCCC';
    foreignLeadersList.style.border = '1px solid transparent';

  foreignLeaders.forEach(leader => {
    const item = document.createElement('div');
    item.style.display = 'flex';
    item.style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
    item.style.marginBottom = '5px';
    item.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128,142,142,0.5)';
    item.style.padding = '4px';
    item.style.borderRadius = '3px';
    item.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';
    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = leader.photo;
    img.style.width = '100px';
    img.style.height = '100px';
    img.style.marginRight = '10px';
    img.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
    const text = document.createElement('p');
    text.style.fontSize = '13px';
    text.innerHTML = `<b>${leader.name}</b> (${leader.country})<br>${leader.description}`;
    item.append(img, text);
    foreignLeadersList.appendChild(item);
  });
  container.appendChild(foreignLeadersList);
}

// === CABINET CONTENT ===
function loadCabinetContent(container) {
  container.innerHTML = '';

  // --- Overview Section ---
    const ov = document.createElement('h2');
    ov.innerText = 'Overview';
    ov.style.textAlign = 'left';
    ov.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
    ov.style.color = '#B62C1A';
    ov.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
    ov.style.fontSize = '24px';
    ov.style.marginTop = '0px';
    container.appendChild(ov);

    let overviewtxt = "";
    overviewtxt += "• " + obtainTextForeignSupportVar() + "<br>";
    overviewtxt += "• " + obtainTextGuineaStateVar() + "<br>";
    overviewtxt += "• " + obtainTextPersonalismVar() + "<br>";
    overviewtxt += "• " + obtainTextCabinetRelationVar() + "<br>";
    overviewtxt += "• " + obtainTextDelgadoLegacyVar() + "<br>";

    const ovsubtxt = document.createElement('h3');
    ovsubtxt.innerHTML = overviewtxt;
    ovsubtxt.style.textAlign = 'left';
    ovsubtxt.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(219, 208, 208, 0.2)';
    ovsubtxt.style.padding = '4px';
    ovsubtxt.style.borderRadius = '1px';
    ovsubtxt.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';
    ovsubtxt.style.marginTop = '-8px';
    ovsubtxt.style.background =
    'linear-gradient(rgba(127, 135, 131, 0.7), rgba(81, 87, 84, 0.4)), url("https://i.imgur.com/FTCMfGJ.png")';

    container.appendChild(ovsubtxt);

  const achievementsTitle = document.createElement('h2');
  achievementsTitle.innerText = 'Achievements';
  achievementsTitle.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
  achievementsTitle.style.color = '#B62C1A';
  achievementsTitle.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
  achievementsTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
  achievementsTitle.style.marginTop = '8px';
  container.appendChild(achievementsTitle);

  // Achievements row (images with tooltip)
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.style.display = 'flex';
  row.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
  row.style.gap = '10px';
  row.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128,142,142,0.5)';
  row.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';
  row.style.borderRadius = '3px';
  row.style.padding = '8px';
  // deskachievementsList should be an array; make sure it exists
  (deskachievementsList || []).forEach(a => {
    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = a.photo;
    img.alt = a.name || '';
    img.style.width = '70px';
    img.style.height = '70px';
    img.style.objectFit = 'cover';
    img.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
    img.style.cursor = 'default';

    // Use a single reusable tooltip: show/move/hide
    const onMouseEnter = (ev) => {
      const html = `<b>${a.name}</b><br>----<br>${a.description}`;
      __deskTooltip.show(html, ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseMove = (ev) => {
      __deskTooltip.move(ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseLeave = () => {
      __deskTooltip.hide();
    };

    img.addEventListener('mouseenter', onMouseEnter);
    img.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
    img.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeave);

    row.appendChild(img);
  });
  container.appendChild(row);

  // Ministers title
  const ministersTitle = document.createElement('h2');
  ministersTitle.innerText = 'Ministers';
  ministersTitle.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
  ministersTitle.style.color = '#B62C1A';
  ministersTitle.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
  ministersTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
  ministersTitle.style.marginTop = '12px';
  container.appendChild(ministersTitle);

  const grid = document.createElement('div'); 
  grid.style.display = 'grid'; 
  grid.style.gridTemplateColumns = 'repeat(4, 1fr)'; 
  grid.style.gap = '10px'; 
  grid.style.marginBottom = '10px'; 
  grid.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128,142,142,0.5)'; 
  grid.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';
  grid.style.borderRadius = '3px';
  grid.style.maxHeight = '250px';
  grid.style.overflowY = 'auto';

  (cabinetMembers || []).forEach(m => {

    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = m.photo;
    img.style.width = '100%';
    img.style.height = 'auto';
    img.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
    img.style.display = 'block';

    // attach tooltip behavior for ministers (same reusable tooltip)
    const onMouseEnterM = (ev) => {
      const html = m.getTooltip ? m.getTooltip() : `<b>${m.name}</b><br>${m.position || ''}`;
      __deskTooltip.show(html, ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseMoveM = (ev) => __deskTooltip.move(ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    const onMouseLeaveM = () => __deskTooltip.hide();

    img.addEventListener('mouseenter', onMouseEnterM);
    img.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMoveM);
    img.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeaveM);

    grid.appendChild(img);
  });

  container.appendChild(grid);
}

// === PARLIAMENT CONTENT ===
function loadParliamentContent(container) {
    container.innerHTML = '';

    const leadershipTitle = document.createElement('h2');
    leadershipTitle.innerText = 'Leadership';
    leadershipTitle.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
    leadershipTitle.style.color = '#B62C1A';
    leadershipTitle.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
    leadershipTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
    leadershipTitle.style.marginTop = '8px';
    container.appendChild(leadershipTitle);

    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.style.display = 'flex';
    div.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
    div.style.alignItems = 'stretch'; // allow middle text to fill vertically
    div.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128,142,142,0.5)';
    div.style.borderRadius = '3px';
    div.style.padding = '4px';
    div.style.position = 'relative';
    div.style.gap = '8px';
    div.style.outline = '1px solid #0F0E0C';

    // --- Left Leader Image ---
    const leftImg = document.createElement('img');
    leftImg.src = parliamentData.leaderLeft.photo;
    leftImg.style.width = '80px';
    leftImg.style.height = '80px';
    leftImg.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
    leftImg.style.objectFit = 'cover';

    const onMouseEnterLeft = (ev) => {
      const html = `<b>${parliamentData.leaderLeft.name}</b><br>(${parliamentData.leaderLeft.party})<br>${parliamentData.leaderLeft.desc}`;
      __deskTooltip.show(html, ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseMoveLeft = (ev) => {
      __deskTooltip.move(ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseLeaveLeft = () => {
      __deskTooltip.hide();
    };

    leftImg.addEventListener('mouseenter', onMouseEnterLeft);
    leftImg.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMoveLeft);
    leftImg.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeaveLeft);

    // --- Center Text Container ---
    const textContainer = document.createElement('div');
    textContainer.style.flex = '1';
    textContainer.style.display = 'flex';
    textContainer.style.flexDirection = 'column';
    textContainer.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
    textContainer.style.padding = '4px 8px';
    textContainer.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';

    // Top-left (Left Leader Name)
    const leftTextDiv = document.createElement('div');
    leftTextDiv.style.textAlign = 'left';
    leftTextDiv.style.fontSize = '13px';
    leftTextDiv.innerHTML = `<b>House Speaker</b><br>${parliamentData.leaderLeft.name}`;

    // Bottom-right (Right Leader Name)
    const rightTextDiv = document.createElement('div');
    rightTextDiv.style.textAlign = 'right';
    rightTextDiv.style.fontSize = '13px';
    rightTextDiv.innerHTML = `<b>Senate Leader</b><br>${parliamentData.leaderRight.name}`;

    // Append both name divs to the text container
    textContainer.append(leftTextDiv, rightTextDiv);

    // --- Right Leader Image ---
    const rightImg = document.createElement('img');
    rightImg.src = parliamentData.leaderRight.photo;
    rightImg.style.width = '80px';
    rightImg.style.height = '80px';
    rightImg.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
    rightImg.style.objectFit = 'cover';

    const onMouseEnterRight = (ev) => {
      const html = `<b>${parliamentData.leaderRight.name}</b><br>(${parliamentData.leaderRight.party})<br>${parliamentData.leaderRight.desc}`;
      __deskTooltip.show(html, ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseMoveRight = (ev) => {
      __deskTooltip.move(ev.pageX, ev.pageY);
    };
    const onMouseLeaveRight = () => {
      __deskTooltip.hide();
    };

    rightImg.addEventListener('mouseenter', onMouseEnterRight);
    rightImg.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMoveRight);
    rightImg.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeaveRight);

    // --- Assemble ---
    div.append(leftImg, textContainer, rightImg);
    container.appendChild(div);

    const partiesTitle = document.createElement('h2');
    partiesTitle.innerText = 'Parties';
    partiesTitle.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
    partiesTitle.style.color = '#B62C1A';
    partiesTitle.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
    partiesTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
    partiesTitle.style.marginTop = '8px';
    container.appendChild(partiesTitle);

    const partiesList = document.createElement('ul');
    partiesList.style.listStyle = 'none';
    partiesList.style.padding = '1px';
    partiesList.style.maxHeight = '218px';
    partiesList.style.overflowY = 'auto';
    partiesList.style.outline = '1px solid #CCCCCC';
    partiesList.style.border = '1px solid transparent';

    parliamentData.parties.forEach(p => {
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.style.display = 'flex';
        row.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
        row.style.alignItems = 'center';
        row.style.marginBottom = '6px';
        row.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(128,142,142,0.5)';
        row.style.borderRadius = '3px';
        row.style.padding = '4px';

        const left = document.createElement('img');
        left.src = p.left.photo;
        left.style.width = '60px';
        left.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";

        const name = document.createElement('div');
        name.innerText = `${p.name}`;
        name.style.textAlign = 'center';
        name.style.flex = '1';

        const right = document.createElement('img');
        right.src = p.right.photo;
        right.style.width = '60px';
        right.style.border = "1px solid #0F0E0C";
        row.append(left, name, right);

        partiesList.appendChild(row);
    });
    container.appendChild(partiesList);
}

// === MAIN OPEN DESK FUNCTION ===
function openDesk() {
  let popOutMenu = document.getElementById('popOutMenu');
  if (!popOutMenu) {
    popOutMenu = document.createElement('div');
    popOutMenu.id = 'popOutMenu';
    popOutMenu.style.position = 'absolute';
    popOutMenu.style.width = '430px';
    popOutMenu.style.height = '550px';
    popOutMenu.style.padding = '15px';
    popOutMenu.style.backgroundColor = '#fff';
    popOutMenu.style.boxShadow = '0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)';
    popOutMenu.style.border = '1px solid #ccc';
    popOutMenu.style.zIndex = '1000';
    popOutMenu.style.backgroundImage = 'url("https://i.imgur.com/sjCE31d.png")';
    popOutMenu.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
    popOutMenu.style.backgroundPosition = 'bottom';
    popOutMenu.style.alignItems = 'center';

    const closeButton = document.createElement('button');
    closeButton.innerText = 'Close';
    closeButton.onclick = closeDesk;
    popOutMenu.appendChild(closeButton);

    const menuTitle = document.createElement('h1');
    menuTitle.innerText = 'The Desk';
    menuTitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
    menuTitle.style.fontFamily = '"Bahnschrift SemiBold", "Bahnschrift", sans-serif';
    menuTitle.style.color = '#B62C1A';
    menuTitle.style.textShadow = '2px 2px 3px #000000';
    menuTitle.style.position = 'relative';
    menuTitle.style.marginTop = '-4px';
    menuTitle.style.marginBottom = '-4px';
    menuTitle.style.lineHeight = '0.7';
    menuTitle.style.padding = '2px';
    menuTitle.style.fontSize = '24px';
    popOutMenu.appendChild(menuTitle);

    const content = document.createElement('div');
    content.id = 'deskContent';
    content.style.flex = '1';
    content.style.overflowY = 'auto';
    popOutMenu.appendChild(content);

    const bottomButtons = document.createElement('div');
    bottomButtons.style.display = 'flex';
    bottomButtons.style.justifyContent = 'space-around';
    bottomButtons.style.padding = '8px';
    bottomButtons.style.position = 'absolute';
    bottomButtons.style.bottom = '0';
    bottomButtons.style.left = '0';
    bottomButtons.style.width = '100%';
    bottomButtons.style.zIndex = '10';
    ['Agenda', 'Foreign', 'Cabinet', 'Parliament'].forEach(name => {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.innerText = name;
      btn.onclick = () => {
        if (name === 'Agenda') loadAgendaContent(content);
        if (name === 'Foreign') loadForeignContent(content);
        if (name === 'Cabinet') loadCabinetContent(content);
        if (name === 'Parliament') loadParliamentContent(content);
      };
      bottomButtons.appendChild(btn);
    });
    popOutMenu.appendChild(bottomButtons);

    document.body.appendChild(popOutMenu);
    makeDraggable(popOutMenu);
    loadAgendaContent(content);
  }

  if (savedX !== null && savedY !== null) {
        popOutMenu.style.left = savedX + 'px';
        popOutMenu.style.top = savedY + 'px';
    } else {
        const buttonRect = event.target.getBoundingClientRect();
        popOutMenu.style.left = buttonRect.right + 353 + 'px';
        popOutMenu.style.top = buttonRect.top - 292 + 'px';
        savedX = popOutMenu.getBoundingClientRect().left;
        savedY = popOutMenu.getBoundingClientRect().top;
    }

  popOutMenu.style.display = 'block';
}

function closeDesk() {
    const popOutMenu = document.getElementById('popOutMenu');
    if (popOutMenu) {
        savedX = popOutMenu.getBoundingClientRect().left;
        savedY = popOutMenu.getBoundingClientRect().top;

        popOutMenu.remove();
    }
}

function refreshDesk() {
    const popOutMenu = document.getElementById('popOutMenu');
    if (popOutMenu) {
        popOutMenu.remove();
        openDesk();
    }
}

function makeDraggable(element) {
    let isDragging = false;
    let offsetX, offsetY;

    element.onmousedown = function(event) {
        isDragging = true;
        offsetX = event.clientX - element.getBoundingClientRect().left;
        offsetY = event.clientY - element.getBoundingClientRect().top;

        document.onmousemove = function(event) {
            if (isDragging) {
                const newX = event.clientX - offsetX;
                const newY = event.clientY - offsetY;

                // Update the position of the element
                element.style.left = newX + 'px';
                element.style.top = newY + 'px';

                // Save the position in global variables
                savedX = newX;
                savedY = newY;
            }
        };

        document.onmouseup = function() {
            isDragging = false;
            document.onmousemove = null;
            document.onmouseup = null;
        };
    };
}

class Character {
    constructor(id, text, picture, onList, status) {
        this.id = id;
        this.text = text;
        this.picture = picture;
        this.onList = onList; // bool (true/false)
        this.status = status // "enemy", "ally"
    }

    removeFromList() {
        this.onList = false;
        refreshDesk();
    }

    makeAlly() {
        this.status = "ally";
        if (!this.onList)
        {
            this.onList = true;
        }
        refreshDesk();
    }

    makeEnemy() {
        this.status = "enemy";
        if (!this.onList)
        {
            this.onList = true;
        }
        refreshDesk();
    }
}

class MinisterDeprecated {
    constructor(id, text, picture, position, status, addingEffect, removingEffect) {
        this.id = id;
        this.text = text;
        this.picture = picture;
        this.position = position;
        this.status = status; // "onCabinet", "onAvailableList", "offAvailableList"
        this.addingEffect = addingEffect;
        this.removingEffect = removingEffect;
    }

    addToCabinet() {
        cabinetList[position].status = "onAvailableList";
        cabinetList[position].removingEffect();
        cabinetList[position] = this;
        this.addingEffect();
        this.status = "onCabinet";
    }

    removeFromAvailableList() {
        this.status = "offAvailableList";
    }
    addToAvailableList() {
        this.status = "onAvailableList";
    }
}

class ForeignLeader {
  constructor(name, photo, country, description) {
    this.name = name;
    this.photo = photo;
    this.country = country;
    this.description = description;
  }
}

class DeskAchievement {
  constructor(name, photo, description) {
    this.name = name;
    this.photo = photo;
    this.description = description;
  }
}

class Minister {
  constructor(name, photo, position, description) {
    this.name = name;
    this.photo = photo;
    this.position = position;
    this.description = description;
  }
}

class Party {
  constructor(name, left, right, congressSeats, senateSeats) {
    this.name = name;
    this.left = left;
    this.right = right;
    this.congressSeats = congressSeats;
    this.senateSeats = senateSeats;
  }
}

class ParliamentaryLeader {
  constructor(name, photo, party, desc) {
    this.name = name;
    this.photo = photo;
    this.party = party;
    this.desc = desc;
  }
}

];

      { photo: 'https://i.imgur.com/ixLqwxD.png', desc:'<b>NAME</b><br>DESC GOES HERE' },
      100,
      50
    )
  ]
};

const __deskTooltip = (() => {
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.id = 'desk-tooltip';
  el.style.position = 'absolute';
  el.style.background = 'rgba(32,32,32,0.95)';
  el.style.color = '#fff';
  el.style.padding = '6px 8px';
  el.style.borderRadius = '6px';
  el.style.fontSize = '12px';
  el.style.lineHeight = '1.2';
  el.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
  el.style.zIndex = '10000';
  el.style.boxShadow = '2px 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
  el.style.opacity = '0';
  el.style.transition = 'opacity .12s ease, transform .12s ease';
  el.style.transform = 'translateY(4px)';
  document.body.appendChild(el);

  return {
    show(html, x, y) {
      el.innerHTML = html;
      // position with small offset, keep on screen
      const padding = 8;
      el.style.left = (x + 12) + 'px';
      el.style.top = (y + 12) + 'px';
      // ensure it stays inside viewport horizontally
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (rect.right > window.innerWidth - padding) {
        el.style.left = (window.innerWidth - rect.width - padding) + 'px';
      }
      if (rect.bottom > window.innerHeight - padding) {
        el.style.top = (y - rect.height - 12) + 'px';
      }
      el.style.opacity = '1';
      el.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    },
    move(x, y) {
      el.style.left = (x + 12) + 'px';
      el.style.top = (y + 12) + 'px';
      const padding = 8;
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (rect.right > window.innerWidth - padding) {
        el.style.left = (window.innerWidth - rect.width - padding) + 'px';
      }
      if (rect.bottom > window.innerHeight - padding) {
        el.style.top = (y - rect.height - 12) + 'px';
      }
    },
    hide() {
      el.style.opacity = '0';
      el.style.transform = 'translateY(4px)';
    }
  };
})();
